productDisplayName: Quiksilver Men Red Firtsy Roundtails Cap
description: Style NoteHow many summer outfits can really beat the heat? This cap from quiksilver does the trick and does it in style! Match it with a tonal top or colour block it with electric blue denims - it'll leave you looking as hot as the season even as you cool off with the cap!Product DetailsRed cap with embroidered branding on the crown centreEyelets all over the crown for ventilationHas a curved visor with stitch detailingPlastic adjustable back strapMaterial and Care60% cotton, 40% polyesterWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
